---
title: "Análisis exploratorio de tasa de natalidad afectada por el desempleo y la pobreza"
author: "Victor Sebastián Aquino Frago, Marianela Noseda, Florencia Salinas, Florencia Soffiantini"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
   html_document:
     toc: true
     toc_depth: 5
     toc_float: true
     collapsed: false
     df_print: paged
     theme:
       version: 5
       bootswatch: litera
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, include = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(readxl)
library(geoAr)
library(plotly)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
